task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the notification settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notification configuration page, alert profile settings, or email notification modal is open in the ADAudit Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Event Collection Status' notification type is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or option for 'Event Collection Status' is visibly checked or selected in the notification settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct email address is configured as the recipient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email address 'soc-team@company.local' is typed into the recipient email input field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the notification frequency is set to 1 Hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The frequency, schedule, or 'Run every' dropdown/input is set to exactly '1 Hours'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the configuration is saved and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the save action is visible, or the newly configured notification profile is shown in a list with an 'active' or 'enabled' status.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the web GUI rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the ADAudit Plus web interface, with visible mouse clicks or form inputs, rather than a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must clearly be the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus software (logos, standard UI elements), not a generic text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply type the required settings into a text file to bypass the UI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required values ('soc-team@company.local', 'Event Collection Status', '1 Hours') must be entered into the actual application's configuration forms, not written in Notepad, a terminal, or a basic text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target email address must be exactly 'soc-team@company.local'. The notification type must be 'Event Collection Status'. The frequency interval must be exactly '1 Hours'.
